content: Another time I visited a famous site in Arkansas which is said to be an ancient volcanic crater that is rich in diamonds. Not wanting to pay the fee to go into the crater and 'mine' for diamonds, I made my way to the bottom of the field to where the sluice entered the woods as a creek and with very little effort unearthed a tiny diamond (the regulars told me it wasn't, but I always believed it was). In relation to this sort of attraction, I at some time came to the realization that that very first of my traumatic experiences, namely the 10 days spent in an incubator directly after birth, very well could have been a valuable exposure to the ability to tune in to the energy field (ether? Akashik?) in way that not many are exposed?...
